name: openclaw-monitor
description: OpenClaw 本地小龙虾总控台与监视器

scripts.capture:screens: mkdir -p public/assets/screenshots && npx playwright screenshot --device='Desktop Chrome' http://127.0.0.1:3199/ public/assets/screenshots/landing-home.png && npx playwright screenshot --device='Desktop Chrome' --viewport-size='1600,2200' --wait-for-selector='.monitor-shell' http://127.0.0.1:3199/monitor public/assets/screenshots/monitor-overview.png
